Segment seg_std_seq2_005 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 first performs reconnaissance on area_zeta as task t1_recon_zeta. Then fleet_1 performs strike on target_zeta as task t2_strike_zeta. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_zeta to t2_strike_zeta. Add a deadline of 12.0 for t2_strike_zeta.

Segment seg_std_seq3_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_a1 as t1_recon, then strike on target_a1 as t2_strike, then standby at point_a1 as t3_standby. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_standby.

Segment seg_std_seq3_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs reconnaissance on area_a2 as t1_recon, then strike on target_a2 as t2_strike, then strike on target_b2 as t3_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_003 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_a3 as t1_recon, strike on target_a3 as t2_strike, reconnaissance on area_b3 as t3_recon, then strike on target_b3 as t4_strike. Segment seg_std_seq3_004 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 performs fly_to on hq_a4 as t1_flyto, jam on hq_a4 as t2_jam, then reconnaissance on hq_a4 as t3_recon. Add sequence dependencies t1_flyto->t2_jam and t2_jam->t3_recon.

Segment seg_std_seq3_005 uses actor fleet_2. fleet_2 performs strike on target_a5 as t1_strike, strike on target_b5 as t2_strike, then strike on target_c5 as t3_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_strike->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_006 uses actor fleet_6. fleet_6 performs strike on target_a6 as t1, strike on target_b6 as t2, strike on target_c6 as t3, then strike on target_d6 as t4. Add sequence dependencies t1->t2, t2->t3, t3->t4.

Segment seg_std_seq3_007 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_a7 as t1_recon, strike on target_a7 as t2_strike, strike on target_b7 as t3_strike, then strike on target_c7 as t4_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike, t2_strike->t3_strike, t3_strike->t4_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_008 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_a8 as t1_recon, track on convoy_a8 as t2_track, strike on target_a8 as t3_strike, then strike on target_b8 as t4_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_track, t2_track->t3_strike, t3_strike->t4_strike.

Segment seg_std_groupsync_002 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_8. Each performs rendezvous at point_s2 (tasks t1_rdv, t2_rdv, t3_rdv). The three formations must start synchronized within a tolerance of 0.5.

Segment seg_std_groupsync_003 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_4 and fleet_8. Each performs rendezvous at point_s3 (tasks t1_rdv, t2_rdv, t3_rdv) by a deadline of 8.0. The three formations must start synchronized within a tolerance of 0.5.

Segment seg_std_cond_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on target_c1 as t1_recon. Once target_c1 is confirmed, fleet_1 performs strike on target_c1 as t2_strike. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c1_confirmed.

Segment seg_std_cond_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs reconnaissance on target_c2 as t1_recon. Once target_c2 is confirmed, fleet_4 performs strike on target_c2 as t2_strike. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c2_confirmed.

Once target_c3 is confirmed, fleet_8 performs strike on target_c3 as t2_strike, then strike on target_d3 as t3_strike. Add a condition_trigger from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c3_confirmed and a sequence from t2_strike to t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_cond_004 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 performs reconnaissance on site_c4 as t1_recon. Once emitter_c4 is detected, fleet_12 performs jam on site_c4 as t2_jam. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_jam gated on emitter_c4_detected.

Segment seg_std_resource_unsat_001 uses actor fleet_9. fleet_9 strikes target_r1, then target_r2, then target_r3 in sequence (tasks t1_strike, t2_strike, t3_strike). fleet_9 carries enough ammunition for only two strikes.

Segment seg_std_resource_unsat_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 strikes target_r4 as t1, target_r5 as t2, target_r6 as t3, target_r7 as t4, target_r8 as t5, then target_r9 as t6 in sequence. fleet_4 cannot carry ammunition for six strikes.

Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_d1 as t1_recon, then strike on target_d1 as t2_strike. Add a sequence dependency t1_recon->t2_strike and a deadline of 3.0 for t2_strike.
Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_002 uses actor fleet_2. fleet_2 strikes target_d2, target_e2, then target_f2 in sequence (t1, t2, t3). Add a deadline of 4.0 for t3.
Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_003 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 jams site_d3 as t1_jam, then jams site_e3 as t2_jam. Add a sequence dependency t1_jam->t2_jam and a deadline of 5.0 for t2_jam.

Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_004 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_d4 as t1_recon, strike on target_d4 as t2_strike, then strike on target_e4 as t3_strike. Chain them with sequence dependencies and add a deadline of 4.0 for t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_physical_001 uses actor fleet_7. fleet_7 performs fly_to on hq_ph1 as t1_flyto, then reconnaissance on hq_ph1 as t2_recon. The flight from hq_base to hq_ph1 covers 10.0 km at 70.0 km/h. Add a sequence dependency from t1_flyto to t2_recon.
